user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Adatum Corporation.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-21 11:30 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
Date: 2024-02-06 10:39 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Laura Nguyen <laura.nguyen@adatumcorpor.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 08:18 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Adatum Corporation deployment blockers

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Infrastructure Manager is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Adatum Corporation
Date: 2024-02-12
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation), Raj Mehta (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into deployment blockers.

[00:06:00] Laura Nguyen (Adatum Corporation): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:11:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is partner engagement.

[00:13:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:15:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:17:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:20:00] Raj Mehta (Microsoft): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Adatum Corporation: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy
